display_name: High quality image generator using FLUX dev model. Top of the line prompt following, visual quality and output diversity. This model is a text to image generation only and does not accept attachments.
description:
High quality image generator using FLUX dev model. Top of the line prompt following, visual quality and output diversity. This model is a text to image generation only and does not accept attachments. To further customize the prompt, you can follow the parameters available:

Set width. Valid pixel options from 128 up to 1920. Default value: 1024
Set height. Valid pixel options from 128, up to 1920. Default value: 1024
Set seed for reproducible result. Options from 1 up to 2**32. Default value: random
Set inference.  Options from 1 up to 50. Default: 25
